revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:Expand language/decode]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 299 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{#switch: {{{1|{{{topic|}}}}}} | bio = Biography | geo = Geography | gov = Government and politics | cult | culture = Culture | hist = History | sci = Science | tech = Technology | mil = Military | sport | sports = Sports | transport = Transport | struct = Building and structure}}Converts a topic code (like geo) into a topic name (like ''Geography'') which is the variable part of the category subtopic name for a given language. Using topic code geo for "French" as an example: * {{tlc|Expand language/decode|geo}} ⟶ {{Expand language/decode|geo}} The corresponding subcategory for French is: [[:Category:Geography articles needing translation from French Wikipedia]]. See [[Template:Expand language#Topics and categorization]].

{{#switch: {{{1|{{{topic|}}}}}} | bio = Biography | geo = Geography | gov = Government and politics | cult | culture = Culture | hist = History | sci = Science | tech = Technology | mil = Military | sport | sports = Sports | transport = Transport | struct = Building and structure}}Converts a topic code (like geo) into a topic name (like ''Geography'') which is the variable part of the category subtopic name for a given language. Using topic code geo for "French" as an example: * {{tlc|Expand language/decode|geo}} ⟶ {{Expand language/decode|geo}} The corresponding subcategory for French is: [[:Category:Geography articles needing translation from French Wikipedia]]. See [[Template:Expand language#Topics and categorization]].

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
